title: Retroactive Induction Request Packet Cover Letter
body:
Date: {{date}}

To: VR&E Case Manager / VR&E Officer

Subject: Request for Retroactive Induction Review
Veteran: [Your Name]
Case Status Stage: {{stage}}

I request review for retroactive induction based on prior training that should be recognized as part of my Chapter 31 rehabilitation path.

The prior program or degree was {{priorProgram}} during {{priorTermWindow}}. At that time, my service-connection status was {{serviceConnectionStatus}}.

The prior training aligns with my current rehabilitation goal as follows: {{currentGoalAlignment}}.

Please review the enclosed records and provide a written decision addressing whether the earlier education or related costs should be recognized retroactively under Chapter 31 and whether any Chapter 33 entitlement restoration is implicated.

Respectfully,

[Your Name]
[Your Contact Information]
